name: watson
description: Watson — offline-first týmový nástroj (úkoly + projekty + kalendář + AI)

scripts.lint: turbo run lint && node scripts/verify-accessibility.mjs && node scripts/verify-overlay-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-mobile-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-kpi-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-outbox-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-recurrence-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-integration-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-mail-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-radar-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-automation-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-employee-hub-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-luckyos-v1-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-employee-self-service-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-employee-files-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-employee-absences-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-employee-lifecycle-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-knowledge-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-information-architecture-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-multi-window-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-pwa-capture-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-public-api-contract.mjs
scripts.gate: pnpm verify:production-config-contract && pnpm verify:backup-contract && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @watson/web test:corpus && pnpm build
scripts.verify:db: pnpm --filter @watson/api verify:contract && pnpm --filter @watson/api verify:drizzle && pnpm --filter @watson/api verify:reminders && pnpm --filter @watson/api verify:mail-vault
